name: THE EXCEPTION FLASH

sections.guidance: The breach, its size, and when it happened; nothing else on the first line.
What must happen and by which hour; flashes measure response in hours.
The one name paged; escalation path if no response.
One chart maximum; the flash links to the full readout, it does not contain it.

example: Docs on-time missed target by 14 points this morning
Owner: document control lead; escalate to PMO at 14:00
